positive: A majestic, stylized fox spirit, rendered in a seamless, graphic tapestry art style. The fox is depicted sitting gracefully within a complex, symmetrical celestial mandala composed of swirling nebulae, stylized crystal formations, and glowing flora. Bioluminescent neon accents highlight the fur, whiskers, and magic surrounding it. Composition is perfectly balanced and centralized, optimized for a circular apparel print graphic. Color palette is restricted to deep indigo, cosmic purple, electric teal, and neon yellow, emphasizing high contrast. The artwork must have crisp linework, intricate dot-work/stencil patterns, strong silhouettes, and the aesthetic of a detailed vector illustration suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, out of focus, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, poorly rendered, jpeg artifacts, messy background, cartoon, photorealism
